data.name: Deadset Darling
data.detailed_description:
Deadset Darling is a mature, choice-driven adult visual novel about betrayal, desire, and starting over in a city that never forgives weakness.

After losing everything that once defined your life, you arrive in a new city searching for a way forward. What waits for you is not peace, but a web of temptation, damaged people, buried secrets, and choices with lasting consequences.

Every connection has a cost. Every decision changes the course of your story. Love, obsession, trust, and self-destruction blur together as you navigate a world where nothing stays simple for long.

Choose your path. Shape your future. Live with the consequences.

Features

  • Choice-driven storytelling with branching paths

  • Multiple romance and relationship routes

  • High-quality 3D rendered scenes

  • Emotional drama, sensual storytelling, and mature themes

  • Free-roam exploration planned for the full game

  • Manage your career and personal life choices

  • Interactive mini-games

Deadset Darling is intended for adults only (18+). It contains sexual content, strong language, and mature themes.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 簡體中文, 日文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-8100 / AMD Ryzen 3 1200 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU with 2 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15360 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-10400 / AMD Ryzen 5 3600 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 11 compatible GPU with 2 GB VRAM
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 20480 MB 可用空間
